lines.gurmukhi: ਧ੍ਰਿਗ ਸ੍ਨੇਹੰ ਬਨਿਤਾ ਬਿਲਾਸ ਸੁਤਹ ॥
lines.translit: dhrig sanehan banitaa bilaas sutah |
lines.english: Cursed is attachment to the joys of family life with one's spouse and children.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧ੍ਰਿਗੰਤ ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਸਨੇਹੰ ਧ੍ਰਿਗ ਸਨੇਹੰ ਭ੍ਰਾਤ ਬਾਂਧਵਹ ॥
lines.translit: dhrigant maat pitaa sanehan dhrig sanehan bhraat baandhavah |
lines.english: Cursed is loving attachment to one's mother and father; cursed is loving attachment to one's siblings and relatives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗ ਸ੍ਨੇਹ ਸਤੵਿੰ ਸੁਖਯੰ ਬਸੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕਹ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: saadhasang saneeh satayin sukhayan basant naanakah |2|
lines.english: Only loving attachment to the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, is True. Nanak dwells there in peace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਥੵੰਤ ਦੇਹੰ ਖੀਣੰਤ ਬਲਨੰ ॥
lines.translit: mithayant dehan kheenant balanan |
lines.english: The body is false; its power is temporary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧ੍ਰਿਗ ਸ੍ਨੇਹੰ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਾਰਥ ਕਹ ॥
lines.translit: dhrig sanehan grihaarath kah |
lines.english: Cursed is attachment to household affairs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਰਧੰਤਿ ਜਰੂਆ ਹਿਤੵੰਤ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: baradhant jarooaa hitayant maaeaa |
lines.english: It grows old; its love for Maya increases greatly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਤੵੰਤ ਆਸਾ ਆਥਿਤੵ ਭਵਨੰ ॥
lines.translit: atayant aasaa aathitay bhavanan |
lines.english: The human is only a temporary guest in the home of the body, but he has high hopes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤੰਤਿ ਮੋਹ ਕੂਪ ਦੁਰਲਭੵ ਦੇਹੰ ਤਤ ਆਸ੍ਰਯੰ ਨਾਨਕ ॥
lines.translit: patant moh koop duralabhay dehan tat aasrayan naanak |
lines.english: The human body, so difficult to obtain, has fallen into the deep dark pit of emotional attachment. O Nanak, its only support is God, the Essence of Reality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਨੰਤ ਸ੍ਵਾਸਾ ਭੈਯਾਨ ਧਰਮੰ ॥
lines.translit: ganant svaasaa bhaiyaan dharaman |
lines.english: The Righteous Judge of Dharma is relentless; he counts each and every breath.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gobind gobind gobind gopaal kripaa |3|
lines.english: O God, Lord of the World, Lord of the Universe, Master of the Universe, please be kind to me. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਚ ਕੋਟੰ ਰਚੰਤਿ ਤੋਯੰ ਲੇਪਨੰ ਰਕਤ ਚਰਮਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: kaach kottan rachant toyan lepanan rakat charamanah |
lines.english: This fragile body-fortress is made up of water, plastered with blood and wrapped in skin.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਨਾਮੰ ਨਹ ਸਿਮਰੰਤਿ ਅਗਿਆਨੀ ਜਾਨੰਤਿ ਅਸਥਿਰੰ ॥
lines.translit: gobind naaman neh simarant agiaanee jaanant asathiran |
lines.english: The ignorant person does not meditate in remembrance on the Lord of the Universe; he thinks that this body is permanent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਵੰਤ ਦੁਆਰੰ ਭੀਤ ਰਹਿਤੰ ਬਾਇ ਰੂਪੰ ਅਸਥੰਭਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: navant duaaran bheet rahitan baae roopan asathanbhanah |
lines.english: It has nine gates, but no doors; it is supported by pillars of wind, the channels of the breath.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਰਲਭ ਦੇਹ ਉਧਰੰਤ ਸਾਧ ਸਰਣ ਨਾਨਕ ॥
lines.translit: duralabh deh udharant saadh saran naanak |
lines.english: This precious body is saved and redeemed in the Sanctuary of the Holy, O Nanak,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰੇ ਜਪੰਤਿ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: har har har har har hare japant |4|
lines.english: chanting the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, Har, Har, Har, Haray. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਿਤਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਿਅੰ ਬਿਸ੍ਰਾਮ ਚਰਣੰ ॥
lines.translit: bhritiaa prian bisraam charanan |
lines.english: O Lover of Your devoted servants, Your Feet are a Sanctuary of Peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੰਭੀਰੰ ਊਚੈ ਸਰਬਗਿ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: ganbheeran aoochai sarabag apaaraa |
lines.english: Profound and Unfathomable, Lofty and Exalted, All-knowing and Infinite Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਭੰਤ ਤੁਯੰ ਅਚੁਤ ਗੁਣਗੵੰ ਪੂਰਨੰ ਬਹੁਲੋ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: subhant tuyan achut gunagayan pooranan bahulo kripaalaa |
lines.english: O Glorious, Eternal and Imperishable, Perfect and Abundantly Compassionate,

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਾਥ ਨਾਥੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਣੰ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: anaath naathe naanak saranan |5|
lines.english: O Master of the masterless, Helper of the helpless, Nanak seeks Your Sanctuary. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮ੍ਰਿਗੀ ਪੇਖੰਤ ਬਧਿਕ ਪ੍ਰਹਾਰੇਣ ਲਖੵ ਆਵਧਹ ॥
lines.translit: mrigee pekhant badhik prahaaren lakhay aavadhah |
lines.english: Seeing the deer, the hunter aims his weapons.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਜਤਨ ਕਰਤਾ ਬਲਵੰਤ ਕਾਰੀ ਸੇਵੰਤ ਸੂਰਾ ਚਤੁਰ ਦਿਸਹ ॥
lines.translit: bahu jatan karataa balavant kaaree sevant sooraa chatur disah |
lines.english: He may be surrounded on all four sides by servants and powerful warriors;

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹੋ ਜਸੵ ਰਖੇਣ ਗੋਪਾਲਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਰੋਮ ਨ ਛੇਦੵਤੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: aho jasay rakhen gopaalah naanak rom na chhedayate |6|
lines.english: But if one is protected by the Lord of the World, O Nanak, not a hair on his head will be touched. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖਮ ਥਾਨ ਬਸੰਤ ਊਚਹ ਨਹ ਸਿਮਰੰਤ ਮਰਣੰ ਕਦਾਂਚਹ ॥
lines.translit: bikham thaan basant aoochah neh simarant maranan kadaanchah |
lines.english: he may dwell in a lofty place, difficult to approach, and never even think of death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਵੰਤਿ ਆਗਿਆ ਭਗਵਾਨ ਪੁਰਖਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀਟੀ ਸਾਸ ਅਕਰਖਤੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: hovant aagiaa bhagavaan purakhah naanak keettee saas akarakhate |7|
lines.english: But when the Order comes from the Primal Lord God, O Nanak, even an ant can take away his breath of life. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੰ ਰਤੰ ਹਿਤੰ ਮਇਆ ਕੀਰਤੰ ਕਲੀ ਕਰਮ ਕ੍ਰਿਤੁਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabadan ratan hitan meaa keeratan kalee karam krituaa |
lines.english: To be imbued and attuned to the Word of the Shabad; to be kind and compassionate; to sing the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises - these are the most worthwhile actions in this Dark Age of Kali Yuga.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟ ਤੁਯੰ ਅਮੋਘ ਦਰਸਨੰ ਬਸੰਤ ਸਾਧ ਰਸਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: drisatt tuyan amogh darasanan basant saadh rasanaa |
lines.english: So obtain the Blessed Vision of His Darshan; He dwells upon the tongues of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਵਾਨ ਰਮਣੰ ਸਰਬਤ੍ਰ ਥਾਨੵਿੰ ॥
lines.translit: bhagavaan ramanan sarabatr thaanayin |
lines.english: God is pervading and permeating all places.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਟੰਤਿ ਤਤ੍ਰਾਗਤ ਭਰਮ ਮੋਹੰ ॥
lines.translit: mittant tatraagat bharam mohan |
lines.english: In this way, one's inner doubts and emotional attachments are dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟੰਤ ਰੂਪੰ ਘਟੰਤ ਦੀਪੰ ਘਟੰਤ ਰਵਿ ਸਸੀਅਰ ਨਖੵਤ੍ਰ ਗਗਨੰ ॥
lines.translit: ghattant roopan ghattant deepan ghattant rav saseear nakhayatr gaganan |
lines.english: Beauty fades away, islands fade away, the sun, moon, stars and sky fade away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਿਅੰ ਜਾਪੁ ਜਪਨਾ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: har har har hare naanak prian jaap japanaa |8|
lines.english: O Nanak, meditate and chant the Name of the Beloved Lord, Har, Har, Har, Haray. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟੰਤ ਕਨਿਕ ਮਾਨਿਕ ਮਾਇਆ ਸ੍ਵਰੂਪੰ ॥
lines.translit: ghattant kanik maanik maaeaa svaroopan |
lines.english: Gold and jewels and the incomparable beauty of Maya fade away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟੰਤ ਲਲਨਾ ਸੁਤ ਭ੍ਰਾਤ ਹੀਤੰ ॥
lines.translit: ghattant lalanaa sut bhraat heetan |
lines.english: One's spouse, children, siblings and loved friends fade away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟੰਤ ਬਸੁਧਾ ਗਿਰਿ ਤਰ ਸਿਖੰਡੰ ॥
lines.translit: ghattant basudhaa gir tar sikhanddan |
lines.english: The earth, mountains, forests and lands fade away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਸਥਿਰੰ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਧ ਜਨ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: asathiran naanak saadh jan |9|
lines.english: O Nanak, only the humble Saints are steady and stable forever. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਹ ਘਟੰਤ ਕੇਵਲ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਅਚੁਤ ॥
lines.translit: neh ghattant keval gopaal achut |
lines.english: Only the Eternal, Unchanging Lord does not fade away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਹ ਬਿਲੰਬ ਧਰਮੰ ਬਿਲੰਬ ਪਾਪੰ ॥
lines.translit: neh bilanb dharaman bilanb paapan |
lines.english: Do not delay in practicing righteousness; delay in committing sins.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਣਿ ਸੰਤੰ ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਨਾਸੰ ਪ੍ਰਾਪਤੰ ਧਰਮ ਲਖੵਿਣ ॥
lines.translit: saran santan kilabikh naasan praapatan dharam lakhayin |
lines.english: In the Sanctuary of the Saints, the sins are erased. The character of righteousness is received by that person,

lines.gurmukhi: ਦ੍ਰਿੜੰਤ ਨਾਮੰ ਤਜੰਤ ਲੋਭੰ ॥
lines.translit: drirrant naaman tajant lobhan |
lines.english: Implant the Naam, the Name of the Lord, within yourself, and abandon greed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਹ ਸੁਪ੍ਰਸੰਨ ਮਾਧਵਹ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naanak jih suprasan maadhavah |10|
lines.english: O Nanak, with whom the Lord is pleased and satisfied. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਰਤ ਮੋਹੰ ਅਲਪ ਬੁਧੵੰ ਰਚੰਤਿ ਬਨਿਤਾ ਬਿਨੋਦ ਸਾਹੰ ॥
lines.translit: mirat mohan alap budhayan rachant banitaa binod saahan |
lines.english: The person of shallow understanding is dying in emotional attachment; he is engrossed in pursuits of pleasure with his wife.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਚਿਤ੍ਰ ਮੰਦਿਰ ਸੋਭੰਤਿ ਬਸਤ੍ਰਾ ਇਤੵੰਤ ਮਾਇਆ ਬੵਾਪਿਤੰ ॥
lines.translit: bachitr mandir sobhant basatraa itayant maaeaa bayaapitan |
lines.english: wondrous mansions, decorations and clothes - this is how Maya clings to him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੇ ਅਚੁਤ ਸਰਣਿ ਸੰਤ ਨਾਨਕ ਭੋ ਭਗਵਾਨਏ ਨਮਹ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: he achut saran sant naanak bho bhagavaane namah |11|
lines.english: O Eternal, Unchanging, Benevolent Lord God, O Sanctuary of the Saints, Nanak humbly bows to You. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੌਬਨ ਬਹਿਕ੍ਰਮ ਕਨਿਕ ਕੁੰਡਲਹ ॥
lines.translit: jauaban bahikram kanik kunddalah |
lines.english: With youthful beauty and golden earrings,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮੰ ਤ ਮਰਣੰ ਹਰਖੰ ਤ ਸੋਗੰ ਭੋਗੰ ਤ ਰੋਗੰ ॥
lines.translit: janaman ta maranan harakhan ta sogan bhogan ta rogan |
lines.english: If there is birth, then there is death. If there is pleasure, then there is pain. If there is enjoyment, then there is disease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਚੰ ਤ ਨੀਚੰ ਨਾਨੑਾ ਸੁ ਮੂਚੰ ॥
lines.translit: aoochan ta neechan naanaa su moochan |
lines.english: If there is high, then there is low. If there is small, then there is great.
